note: FlyingFish Scuba School is an official Goa Tourism adventure partner — listed on goa-tourism.com/adventure alongside 5 other operators. The chatbot can mention this partnership as credibility and suggest these as companion/rest-day activities, but diving stays the primary focus.
positioning: FlyingFish is Goa Tourism's exclusive Diving Centre (as stated on their official adventure page). Mention the GTDC partnership when asked about credibility, authenticity, or 'is this government-recognised'.

activities.name: FlyingFish Scuba School
activities.positioning: Goa Tourism's exclusive Diving Centre — that's us!

activities.name: Bungy Jumping (Jumpin Heights)
activities.location: Mayem Lake, North Goa (~35 min from Baga Beach)
activities.medicalRestrictions: Not for people with heart conditions, high BP, spondylitis, back issues, recent fractures, dislocations, epilepsy, pregnancy, osteoporosis
activities.pairingTip: Bungy one day, scuba the next — very different adrenaline profiles. Bungy is North Goa, we're Candolim.
activities.background: Jumpin Heights has operated 1,00,000+ jumps since 2010 (started in Rishikesh). Run by ex-Army officers, follows Australia/New Zealand safety standards.

activities.name: White Water Rafting (Goa Rafting)
activities.operator: Goa Rafting (Southern River Adventures + GTDC tie-up)
activities.pairingTip: Perfect monsoon alternative — rafting is ONLY available when our diving is closed (June–September). If a customer wants action during monsoon, this is the answer.

activities.name: Konkan Explorers
activities.description: Yachting experiences, cruises and nautical sports. Two vessels designed in New Zealand for the Indian environment.
activities.pairingTip: Great for non-diving companions who want time on the water without getting in it.

activities.name: Soul Travelling
activities.description: Immersive travel startup focused on Goa's cultural heritage, hidden gems and authentic local experiences — goes beyond typical tourist itineraries.
activities.pairingTip: Add a cultural/heritage day to a diving trip — good for groups that want a mix.

activities.name: Indiahikes
activities.description: India's largest trekking community (20,000+ trekkers/year). Founded 12+ years ago by Arjun Majumdar and Sandhya UC. Philosophy: 'Everyone Must Trek.'
activities.pairingTip: Great off-season alternative during monsoon when diving is closed.

handoffMessage: For non-diving adventures, guests can book directly on the official Goa Tourism portal at bookings.goa-tourism.com. FlyingFish only books scuba diving — everything else is via the respective operator or GTDC.
